subcodes.first_line: O thou sapling in the garden of consciousness! The Day of God hath come, and the Sun of Truth hath risen from the divine horizon, manifest and resplendent [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای نهال باغ وجدان یوم الله آفتاب حقیقی از افق الهی مشرق و ظاهر و لائح بود و
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God as sun, @light and darkness, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @being a source of light; guidance
